evals.prompt: I need a PRD for adding multi-factor authentication (MFA) to our user authentication system. Use checklist format for acceptance criteria.
evals.expected_output: Skill infers title 'Multi-Factor Authentication', gathers Business Context, Requirements, and Checklist Acceptance Criteria from user inputs with validation. No optional sections requested. Displays complete PRD in session ready for next skill.

evals.prompt: Create a PRD for the payment processing refactor from Stripe v2 to v3. Use BDD-style acceptance criteria and include both design links and implementation notes since this is complex.
evals.expected_output: Skill infers title 'Stripe v2 to v3 Migration', asks about optional sections (user confirms Design & Mockups and Implementation Notes). Gathers content for each section. Builds PRD with BDD Given/When/Then scenarios, optional Design & Mockups section, and optional Implementation Notes section. Displays complete PRD in session.

evals.prompt: I need a PRD for fixing the checkout abandonment issue. Include both checklist items AND BDD scenarios for acceptance criteria. This feature is high-risk due to payment processing, so include the Risks & Dependencies section.
evals.expected_output: Skill infers title 'Checkout Abandonment Fix', asks about optional sections (user confirms Risks & Dependencies). Gathers content for all sections. Builds PRD with both checklist and BDD acceptance criteria, includes comprehensive Risks & Dependencies section. Displays complete PRD in session with all sections clearly separated.

evals.prompt: Create a PRD for the email notification system redesign. Use checklist format for acceptance criteria.
evals.expected_output: Skill infers title 'Email Notification System Redesign', asks about optional sections (user chooses none). Gathers Business Context, Requirements, and Checklist Acceptance Criteria with validation. Displays complete mandatory-only PRD in session, ready to pass to Jira creation skill.
